description: Module Registry (table of contents) for Project Playbook learning lessons. This file defines what learning modules exist, how they are grouped (category), who can access them (allowedOrgTypes), and which local content JSON to load (contentKey). The app uses this to render the Lessons UI and enforce access rules.

notes.ordering: Modules are grouped in this file by category in this order: general, education, small_business, local_government.
notes.imageUsage: Images are loaded from /public using paths such as /sampleimage1.png or /lesson-images/phishing.png. Set image to null if no image exists yet.

modules.title: Phishing Basics
modules.synopsis: Learn how to spot phishing emails, fake logins, and suspicious links before they become incidents.

modules.title: Social Engineering Awareness
modules.synopsis: Recognize manipulation tactics like impersonation, pretexting, baiting, and tailgating.

modules.title: Password Basics
modules.synopsis: Build better password habits, understand password managers, and reduce account takeover risk.

modules.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
modules.synopsis: Understand why MFA matters, where to enable it, and how it helps stop account compromise.

modules.title: Safe Internet & Link Safety
modules.synopsis: Use safer browsing habits, verify links, and avoid risky downloads and fake websites.

modules.title: Keeping Student Health and Personal Info Safe
modules.synopsis: Handle student data safely and avoid FERPA issues involving AI tools, email, sharing, and personal devices.

modules.title: Student Device and Account Safety
modules.synopsis: Reduce classroom technology risk through safer device handling, account hygiene, and smart daily practices.

modules.title: Classroom Communication & Data Safety
modules.synopsis: Avoid common mistakes when emailing, sharing, and discussing student information across school platforms.

modules.title: Vendor Invoice and Email Fraud
modules.synopsis: Recognize invoice scams, payment redirection attempts, and high-risk business email patterns.

modules.title: Customer Data Handling Basics
modules.synopsis: Protect customer and employee information through practical handling, storage, and sharing habits.

modules.title: Ransomware & Backup Awareness
modules.synopsis: Understand ransomware warning signs, why backups matter, and when to report suspicious activity quickly.

modules.title: Government Systems & Targeted Attacks
modules.synopsis: Understand why government systems are frequent cyberattack targets and how employees can recognize early warning signs.

modules.title: Incident Response & Reporting for Agencies
modules.synopsis: Teach staff how to recognize, escalate, document, and support response to cybersecurity incidents using approved agency procedures.

modules.title: Ransomware & Service Disruption Awareness
modules.synopsis: Prepare staff to recognize ransomware risks early and understand how outages can affect public services.
